scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/plugin build && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin test
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/plugin lint && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --cwd packages/plugin lint:fix && bun run --cwd packages/pi-plugin lint:fix
